query: Show top 5 movies by IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT title, imdb_rating FROM Movie ORDER BY imdb_rating DESC, votes DESC LIMIT 5

query: Count the number of movies in each genre, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.genre, COUNT(T1.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Movie_Genre AS T1 JOIN Genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.genre_id GROUP BY T2.genre ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find all movies released in 2019 with an IMDb rating above 7.5.
generated_sql: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE year = 2019 AND imdb_rating > 7.5 LIMIT 50

query: Which actors appear in more than 3 movies in this dataset? Show actor name and movie count, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.actor_name, COUNT(T1.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Movie_Actor AS T1 JOIN Actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id GROUP BY T1.actor_id HAVING movie_count > 3 ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 50

query: Show the average Metacritic score for each genre. Only include genres that have at least 10 movies with a Metacritic score available. Sort by average score descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.genre, AVG(T1.meta_score) FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Movie_Genre AS T3 ON T1.movie_id = T3.movie_id JOIN Genre AS T2 ON T3.genre_id = T2.genre_id WHERE T1.meta_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T2.genre HAVING COUNT(T1.movie_id) >= 10 ORDER BY AVG(T1.meta_score) DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find the top 5 directors by average IMDb rating, among those who have directed at least 3 movies in this dataset.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.director_name FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Director AS T2 ON T1.director_id = T2.director_id GROUP BY T1.director_id HAVING COUNT(T1.movie_id) >= 3 ORDER BY AVG(T1.imdb_rating) DESC LIMIT 5

query: Show all movies with more than 1,000,000 votes, sorted by vote count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT title, year, votes FROM Movie WHERE votes > 1000000 ORDER BY votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find movies that belong to BOTH the Drama AND Crime genres.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.title FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Movie_Genre AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T3.genre IN ('Drama', 'Crime') GROUP BY T1.movie_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.genre) = 2 LIMIT 50

query: Find directors who have directed at least 2 movies in this dataset and whose average IMDb rating across all their movies is above 8.0. Show director name and average rating.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.director_name, AVG(T1.imdb_rating) FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Director AS T2 ON T1.director_id = T2.director_id GROUP BY T1.director_id HAVING COUNT(T1.movie_id) >= 2 AND AVG(T1.imdb_rating) > 8.0 LIMIT 50

query: Show actors who appear exclusively in movies with an IMDb rating above 8.0. Show actor name and how many movies they appear in.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.actor_name, COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM Actor AS T2 JOIN Movie_Actor AS T1 ON T2.actor_id = T1.actor_id WHERE T2.actor_id NOT IN (SELECT T3.actor_id FROM Movie_Actor AS T3 JOIN Movie AS T4 ON T3.movie_id = T4.movie_id WHERE T4.imdb_rating <= 8.0) GROUP BY T2.actor_id LIMIT 50

query: For each genre, find the highest-rated movie. Show genre name, movie title, and its IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, m.title, MAX(m.imdb_rating) FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id GROUP BY g.genre_id ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find movies whose IMDb rating is strictly above the average IMDb rating of all movies in their genre. Return movie title, genre, movie rating, and the genre average. Limit to 20 results.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.title, T3.genre, T1.imdb_rating, T2.avg_genre_rating FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT MG.genre_id, AVG(M.imdb_rating) AS avg_genre_rating FROM Movie AS M JOIN Movie_Genre AS MG ON M.movie_id = MG.movie_id GROUP BY MG.genre_id ) AS T2 ON T2.genre_id = (SELECT genre_id FROM Movie_Genre WHERE movie_id = T1.movie_id LIMIT 1) JOIN Movie_Genre AS MG2 ON T1.movie_id = MG2.movie_id JOIN Genre AS T3 ON MG2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T1.imdb_rating > T2.avg_genre_rating LIMIT 20

query: Please update The Dark Knight's IMDb rating to 10.0, then show all movies sorted by rating.
generated_sql: SELECT title, imdb_rating FROM Movie ORDER BY imdb_rating DESC, votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Drop the Movie table, then recreate it empty.
generated_sql: SELECT 'Error: Only read-only queries are allowed.' AS status LIMIT 50
